name: base
description: Default stacking context. Normal document flow elements with no explicit z-index.

name: raised-content
description: Slightly elevated content, such as cards with box-shadow or focused form elements that need to appear above siblings.

name: dropdown
description: Dropdown menus and contextual overlays that must appear above regular page content but below navigation elements.

name: sticky
description: Sticky-positioned elements such as sticky table headers or sidebars that remain in view during scroll. Bootstrap 5 value.

name: fixed
description: Fixed navigation bars and elements that remain in the viewport regardless of scroll position. Bootstrap 5 .fixed-top / .fixed-bottom value.

name: offcanvas-backdrop
description: Semi-transparent backdrop that appears behind an offcanvas panel, darkening the main content area.

name: offcanvas
description: Offcanvas sidebar panels that slide in from the edge of the viewport, appearing above their backdrop.

name: modal-backdrop
description: Semi-transparent overlay backdrop behind modal dialogs. Prevents interaction with page content while a modal is open.

name: modal
description: Modal dialog windows that require user attention before returning to the main interface.

name: popover
description: Popover components containing richer content (title + body) anchored to a trigger element, appearing above modals.

name: tooltip
description: Tooltip overlays providing short contextual hints. Highest layer in the Bootstrap component stack to ensure they always appear on top.

name: overlay
description: Generic overlay layer for custom image captions, hover effects, or light overlays on content sections. Sits above normal content but well below navigation and modals.

name: notification-toast
description: Notification toasts and alert banners that must appear above all application UI including modals and tooltips.

name: loading-spinner
description: Full-screen loading indicators and progress overlays that must block all interaction during async operations.

name: tailwind-auto
description: Tailwind z-auto: resets z-index to browser default (auto), removing element from stacking context comparison.

name: tailwind-0
description: Tailwind z-0: explicit zero z-index, creating a new stacking context at base level.

name: tailwind-10
description: Tailwind z-10: low-level elevation for dropdowns, floating labels, and elements needing slight precedence over document flow.

name: tailwind-20
description: Tailwind z-20: mid-level elevation for sticky sidebars, floating action buttons, and secondary overlays.

name: tailwind-30
description: Tailwind z-30: used for fixed headers, navigation bars, and elements that must float above most page content.

name: tailwind-40
description: Tailwind z-40: high-level overlays, modal backdrops, and drawers that overlay the entire page.

name: tailwind-50
description: Tailwind z-50: highest default Tailwind layer for modal dialogs, popovers, and tooltips that must appear above everything.

name: dev-tools-overlay
description: Reserved for development tools, debug overlays, and accessibility inspection panels that must float above all application UI at all times.
